summary: Iteration 97: Launch Readiness Testing - Comprehensive testing of Stripe checkout, Trade Circle, Sacred Texts, Encyclopedia, Music Lounge, Cosmic Mixer, Frequencies, SmartDock, and Cosmic Mood Ring. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly with proper content.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical flows verified: Stripe checkout returns real stripe.com URLs, Trade Circle CRUD works with category validation (goods/services/both), Sacred Texts returns 15+ texts, Encyclopedia returns 12+ traditions, 7.83 Hz Schumann Resonance uses binaural beats (stereo ChannelMerger), SmartDock minimize/restore works, Cosmic Mood Ring Quick Log has 8 moods with data-testid='quick-mood-{id}'.

backend_subscriptions_tiers.details: GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns all 5 tiers (free, starter, plus, premium, super_user) with credit packs and AI costs

backend_stripe_checkout.details: POST /api/subscriptions/checkout returns real Stripe checkout URL (stripe.com). Rejects free tier and missing origin_url

backend_trade_circle.details: GET /api/trade-circle/listings returns listings array. POST creates listing with category validation (goods/services/both). Stats include karma

backend_sacred_texts.details: GET /api/sacred-texts returns 15 sacred texts with chapters. Single text endpoint returns full details

backend_encyclopedia.details: GET /api/encyclopedia/traditions returns 12 traditions. Single tradition returns key_concepts, sacred_texts, notable_figures, practices

backend_frequencies.details: GET /api/frequencies returns frequency list including 7.83 Hz Schumann resonance

frontend_pricing_page.details: Loads with 5 tier cards (free, starter, plus, premium, super_user) and 3 credit packs. Upgrade buttons present

frontend_trade_circle.details: Page loads with Create Listing button. Modal opens correctly. Category filters (All, Goods, Services, Both) present

frontend_sacred_texts.details: Page loads with 15 sacred text cards including Bhagavad Gita, Tao Te Ching, Upanishads, Dhammapada

frontend_music_lounge.details: Page loads with 10 music tracks and category filters

frontend_cosmic_mixer.details: Page loads with frequency layer (including 7.83 Hz), sound layer (rain), mantra layer (Om), light therapy layer

frontend_frequencies.details: Page loads with 12 frequency cards and play buttons

frontend_soundscapes.details: Page loads with ambient sound content

frontend_smartdock.details: SmartDock visible on homepage. Minimize to sparkle dot works. Restore from minimized works

frontend_mood_ring_quick_log.details: CosmicMoodRing component has Quick Log button (data-testid='quick-mood-toggle') and 8 mood options (data-testid='quick-mood-{id}'). Requires authentication

binaural_beats_7_83_hz.details: 7.83 Hz Schumann Resonance implemented with binaural beats using stereo ChannelMerger (200 Hz left, 207.83 Hz right). Code verified in Frequencies.js line 52-79, CosmicMixerPage.js line 148-169, MusicLounge.js line 137-167
